title: Brainrot Saga
description: This mod adds plenty of brainrot related features, including a new, op sword.
body:
Brainrot Saga adds brainrot mobs and items, including Skibidi Toilet, the Imposter, the Gedagedigedagedago Chicken Nugget, the Duolingo Bird, Six Seven, Strawberry Elephant, Caseoh, and more to come! These mobs drop all-new items like the Toilet Shard, Chicken Nugget, and Spanish Lesson. Combining these mobs' drops makes a new material, brainrot, which is used to create Brainrot tools and armor!

_More brainrot mobs and tools coming eventually..._
